text.title: vision-applications Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for vision-applications as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Passing remote image URLs from user input directly to the API without validation.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Remote URLs embedded in prompts are fetched by the API server; URLs behind auth or expired pre-signed URLs cause silent failures.

failure-mode.description: Using json_mode without a schema in the prompt.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Model chooses field names and nesting arbitrarily — output is unpredictable across requests.

failure-mode.description: JSON mode does not guarantee schema adherence — a ContentModerator returning {"severity": "HIGH"} instead of "high" breaks downstream logic silently.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Always normalize output fields to expected types and values.

failure-mode.description: Remote image URLs embedded in prompts are fetched by the API server; ensure URLs are publicly accessible and not behind auth.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: URLs behind auth or expired pre-signed URLs cause silent failures.

failure-mode.description: An agent passing raw file paths assumes the runtime has read access — always validate path existence before open().
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Path errors should fail loudly, not silently propagate.

failure-mode.description: The VisionService.batch_analyze() is sequential (one-by-one); for true parallelism, wrap with asyncio or concurrent.futures.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Sequential batching is slow; parallelism is required for production performance.

failure-mode.description: Vision models occasionally "hallucinate" text in images (especially small or blurry text) — for high-stakes OCR, cross-validate with a second API call.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Different prompts and models produce different outputs; validation prevents silent errors.
